items.title: BTS tops Spotify weekly charts for 2nd week with new album 'Arirang'
items.snippet: K-pop megastar BTS topped Spotify's weekly charts for the second straight week with its latest album "Arirang," the septet's agency said Saturday. The group remained atop the globa...
items.description: K-pop megastar BTS topped Spotify's weekly charts for the second straight week with its latest album "Arirang," the septet's agency said Saturday. The group remained atop the global music streaming platform's three charts -- Weekly Top Albums Global, Weekly Top Songs Global and Weekly Top Artists Global -- for the week from March 27 to Thursday, according to BigHit Music. items.title: T.O.P drops ‘Another Dimension’ ahead of Big Bang’s Coachella anniversary stage
items.snippet: T.O.P has made a long-awaited return with his first full-length album, released Friday. It marks his first solo release in 13 years since “Doom Dada.” The rapper released “Another...
items.description: T.O.P has made a long-awaited return with his first full-length album, released Friday. It marks his first solo release in 13 years since “Doom Dada.” The rapper released “Another Dimension” along with the music video for one of its two main tracks, “Desperado.” “Desperado” delivers a candid and direct portrayal of love, with a minimalist music video that focuses on the track’s intense mood and T.O.P’s nuanced emotional expression. “For almost 10 years, I focused solely on making music,” T.O.P s

items.title: Hybe’s Latin boy group Santos Bravos to make Korea debut
items.snippet: Santos Bravos, a Latin pop boy group under Hybe, is set to make its first appearance on Korean music shows since its debut. According to Hybe Latin America, the group will arrive i...
items.description: Santos Bravos, a Latin pop boy group under Hybe, is set to make its first appearance on Korean music shows since its debut. According to Hybe Latin America, the group will arrive in Korea on Friday and stay for about three weeks to carry out various promotional activities, including performances on local music programs. “Promoting in Korea, the birthplace of K-pop, is a meaningful challenge for us,” Santos Bravos said. “We want to present great performances with respect while proudly showcasing

items.title: Mamamoo unveils world tour plans
items.snippet: Mamamoo announced the destinations for its international tour, which will begin in June, via agency RBW Entertainment Friday. The group of four will kick off the tour with three sh...
items.description: Mamamoo announced the destinations for its international tour, which will begin in June, via agency RBW Entertainment Friday. The group of four will kick off the tour with three shows in Seoul starting June 19. It will be followed by four stops in Southeast Asia, and then the US leg, which includes seven cities. In October, the quartet will resume the tour in Hong Kong and more shows will be added later. The tour is part of its plans to celebrate the 12th anniversary of Mamamoo's debut. Before l

items.title: NewJeans logs 900m on Spotify with ‘Ditto’
items.snippet: NewJeans achieved 900 million plays on Spotify with its 2022 hit “Ditto,” said agency Ador Friday. It's the group’s second song to pass the milestone, after “OMG.” “Ditto” is a B-s...
items.description: NewJeans achieved 900 million plays on Spotify with its 2022 hit “Ditto,” said agency Ador Friday. It's the group’s second song to pass the milestone, after “OMG.” “Ditto” is a B-side track from its single album “OMG,” which was released in December 2022. The dance tune landed its first entry on the Billboard Hot 100 and the UK’s Official Singles Top 100, ranking No. 82 and No. 95, respectively. The quintet made the Hot 100 in the fastest time for a Korean artist -- six months after its debut --

items.title: BTS to drop 'Come Over,' exclusive new track on 'Arirang' LP
items.snippet: BTS will drop a new single, "Come Over," as part of an LP version of their "Arirang" album, BigHit Music said Friday. The new vinyl record will feature all 14 songs from the fifth...
items.description: BTS will drop a new single, "Come Over," as part of an LP version of their "Arirang" album, BigHit Music said Friday. The new vinyl record will feature all 14 songs from the fifth studio album, along with the new song dedicated to their fans, ARMY, which will be available exclusively on the LP, according to the company. items.title: BTS takes to livestream to thank fans for chart success
items.snippet: BTS expressed its gratitude to fans for helping it debut atop Billboard’s Hot 100, in a livestream that aired Wednesday night. “I almost passed out last night, and when I woke up a...
items.description: BTS expressed its gratitude to fans for helping it debut atop Billboard’s Hot 100, in a livestream that aired Wednesday night. “I almost passed out last night, and when I woke up at 3 a.m., it was blowing up,” said RM, “all thanks to our fans.” The seven members wanted to celebrate with fans the news that “Swim,” the main track from their fifth LP “Arirang,” had shot to the top of the chart on its debut. items.title: Enhypen’s ‘XO’ reaches 200m Spotify streams
items.snippet: Enhypen exceeded 200 million Spotify streams with “XO (Only If You Say Yes)” as of Tuesday, its agency Belift Lab said Thursday. With “XO,” the group reached the milestone for the...
items.description: Enhypen exceeded 200 million Spotify streams with “XO (Only If You Say Yes)” as of Tuesday, its agency Belift Lab said Thursday. With “XO,” the group reached the milestone for the sixth time, after “Bite Me,” “Fever,” “Drunk-Dazed,” “Polaroid Love” and “Given-Taken.” “XO” is the lead single from Enhypen's second studio album “Romance: Untold,” which debuted on the Billboard 200 at No. 2 and charted 17 weeks on the main albums chart. The LP was released in 2024 and sold over 2.3 million copies in

items.title: Katseye to drop single ahead of Coachella debut
items.snippet: Katseye will release the single “Pinky Up” on April 9, its labels Hybe and Geffen Records announced Wednesday. The single drops two days before it is poised to take the Coachella V...
items.description: Katseye will release the single “Pinky Up” on April 9, its labels Hybe and Geffen Records announced Wednesday. The single drops two days before it is poised to take the Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival stage for the first time. items.title: Why are K-pop stars betting on Galaxy Corp.?

items.description: As Galaxy Corp. continues to sign high-profile artists who have newly become free agents, industry officials are questioning why established names are joining a relatively unknown agency branding itself as an “AI entertainment technology company.” Singer Kwon Eun-bi, who rose to fame through project girl group Iz*One, is reportedly preparing to join Galaxy Corp., just three weeks after the company signed Taemin, formerly of boy band SHINee. items.title: VR concerts gain ground as new frontier for K-pop on big screen
items.snippet: Virtual reality concerts are steadily gaining traction among K-pop fans, emerging as a more accessible way to experience live performances beyond traditional venues. At a VR concer...
items.description: Virtual reality concerts are steadily gaining traction among K-pop fans, emerging as a more accessible way to experience live performances beyond traditional venues. At a VR concert, viewers wear headsets that immerse them in a highly personalized concert environment — one that can feel as if the artist is performing just for them. By tracking hand gestures, the system allows viewers to interact with the experience, from selecting story elements to focusing on individual members during performan

items.title: BTS teases ‘2.0’ music video with nod to Park Chan-wook’s ‘Oldboy’
items.snippet: BTS unveiled a music video teaser for “2.0,” a track from its fifth LP “Arirang,” on Wednesday. The teaser draws inspiration from director Park Chan-wook’s 2003 film “Oldboy,” offe...
items.description: BTS unveiled a music video teaser for “2.0,” a track from its fifth LP “Arirang,” on Wednesday. The teaser draws inspiration from director Park Chan-wook’s 2003 film “Oldboy,” offering a brief yet striking glimpse that has heightened anticipation for the full release. Set in a worn-down corridor and elevator, the video opens with a narrow hallway filled with rough, intimidating figures. As the elevator doors open on the second floor, BTS members appear dressed in clean-cut suits, some holding ne

items.title: All but 1 of BTS' new songs chart Billboard’s Hot 100
items.snippet: BTS now has 13 songs on Billboard’s Hot 100, led by “Swim” at No. 1 on the chart dated April 4. Only one track from the new album, “Arirang,” failed to debut on the main songs char...
items.description: BTS now has 13 songs on Billboard’s Hot 100, led by “Swim” at No. 1 on the chart dated April 4. Only one track from the new album, “Arirang,” failed to debut on the main songs chart: “No. 29,” the instrumental track featuring the sound of a bell registered as a South Korean national treasure. Seven of the 13 entries sat among the top 50, meaning 39 of the group's songs have now made it to the chart, since “DNA” first entered it in 2017. items.title: Super Junior’s Donghae to bring out 1st solo LP
items.snippet: Donghae of Super Junior finalized plans for his solo comeback, his agency Ode Entertainment said Wednesday. He will roll out his first solo studio album, “Alive,” on April 20 and i...
items.description: Donghae of Super Junior finalized plans for his solo comeback, his agency Ode Entertainment said Wednesday. He will roll out his first solo studio album, “Alive,” on April 20 and is planning to prerelease a single on April 7. His first solo endeavor was the digital single “Harmony” in 2020, which came 15 years after he began his music career with Super Junior.
